svg.title: Prototype to enterprise migration timeline
svg.desc: A horizontal timeline showing a logistics platform evolving from a Python and Vite prototype at month zero, to a Go optimisation engine replacement at month six, to a new driver UI via UI Composition at month twelve, to Extract Product Lines for market expansion at month eighteen, to an Elixir real-time tracking layer at month twenty-four. Each migration is bounded and does not require stopping the rest of the system.
svg.text: System continues in production throughout — no rewrite, no stop-the-world migration
